'''nadhara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:averin|averin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:averin|averin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nadhara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædhæræth|nædhæræth]] || [[word:nædhæræj|nædhæræj]] || [[word:nædhæræsh|nædhæræsh]] || [[word:nædhæræ|nædhæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhadharath|nadhadharath]] || [[word:nadhadharaj|nadhadharaj]] || [[word:nadhadharash|nadhadharash]] || [[word:nadhadhara|nadhadhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadharath|nadharath]] || [[word:nadharaj|nadharaj]] || [[word:nadharash|nadharash]] || [[word:nadhara|nadhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhafrath|nadhafrath]] || [[word:nadhafraj|nadhafraj]] || [[word:nadhafrash|nadhafrash]] || [[word:nadhafraf|nadhafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadharatha|nadharatha]] || [[word:nadharaja|nadharaja]] || [[word:nadharasha|nadharasha]] || [[word:nadharaka|nadharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadharath|nadharath]] || [[word:nadharaj|nadharaj]] || [[word:nadharash|nadharash]] || [[word:nadhara|nadhara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadharathal|nadharathal]] || [[word:nadharajal|nadharajal]] || [[word:nadharashal|nadharashal]] || [[word:nadharakal|nadharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadharathatha|nadharathatha]] || [[word:nadharajaja|nadharajaja]] || [[word:nadharashasha|nadharashasha]] || [[word:nadharaka|nadharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadharathan|nadharathan]] || [[word:nadharajan|nadharajan]] || [[word:nadharashan|nadharashan]] || [[word:nadharakan|nadharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadharathaoro|nadharathaoro]] || [[word:nadharajaoro|nadharajaoro]] || [[word:nadharashaoro|nadharashaoro]] || [[word:nadharakaoro|nadharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
